assertionResults.reason: A distinct transition annotation is visible on the 1Y candlestick view ("New V..." marker area), indicating the historical-to-new-venue boundary.
reproductionNotes: Open app at http://localhost:3102 in Candle mode.
Observe transition annotation near the right side of the chart.

assertionResults.reason: 1H and 1Y tabs both update candlestick rendering with different candle density/time scale appropriate to timeframe.
reproductionNotes: Click 1H and observe dense short-interval candles.
Click 1Y and observe compressed long-range candles/time axis.

assertionResults.reason: No live trade events were observed during the validation window, so rightmost-candle OHLC mutation behavior could not be confirmed.
reproductionNotes: Open 1H candlestick view and capture baseline screenshot.
Wait ~65 seconds for potential real-time trade updates.
Capture follow-up screenshot and check Transactions table/network logs.
Observed no recent transactions and no captured trades/WS activity for validation.

evidence.network: No captured requests for filters 'trades' or '3101' during observation window

frictions.description: agent-browser daemon returned a transient busy error during a long wait step.
frictions.resolution: Retried in the same isolated session and continued evidence capture.

frictions.description: Transition marker label appears partially clipped in viewport ("New V..."), making it subtle to visually parse at first glance.
frictions.resolution: Validated using 1Y screenshot plus annotated capture for context.

blockers.description: No live trade feed activity observed in the UI during the test window, preventing confirmation of real-time candle OHLC updates.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Waited ~65s, compared before/after screenshots, checked Transactions section and network request logs for trade/WS activity.

summary: Validated 3 assertions: 2 passed (VAL-CANDLE-004, VAL-CANDLE-005), 1 blocked (VAL-CANDLE-006 due to missing live trade events).
